title: senecio ludens
intro: Senecio ludens, also known as the "playful ragwort" or "green enchanter," is a flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio ludens include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression, and supporting the immune system. Senecio ludens can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
